workflow: One generation per asset; flat chroma-key background; local soft-matte removal and despill; 512x512 WebP runtime output.
sharedPrompt: Original polished hard-surface 3D FLIPSTRIKE game sprite, front three-quarter orthographic view, coherent futuristic neon arcade visual language, single centered machine, crisp readable silhouette, no text, logo, watermark, character, or scenery.

roles.drifter: Compact hovering patrol drone with cyan core and swept stabilizer fins.
roles.patrol: Horizontal arrowhead patrol machine with twin thrusters and blue-violet sensor.
roles.shield: Guardian with a broad amber hexagonal energy shield and visible central core.
roles.armor: Heavy layered graphite bastion with breakable seams and red-orange reactor.
roles.sniper: Narrow diamond precision machine with long emitter and magenta targeting lens.
roles.artillery: Broad floating platform with three plasma mortar tubes and orange reactor.
roles.healer: White graphite repair machine with segmented halo, three arms, and turquoise core.
roles.support: Three-petal broadcast relay with blue conduits and compact silver chassis.
roles.summoner: Dark circular portal frame with fabrication claws and violet energy core.
roles.splitter: Three interlocking triangular segments around a bright coral core.
roles.ghost: Broken crescent phase frame with void gaps and pale-blue energy fins.
roles.reflector: Mirrored chrome pinwheel vanes around a gold-blue prism lens.

bosses.architect: Monumental construction machine with wall-building arms and amber blueprint panels.
bosses.polar-core: Opposing magnetic crescents around a suspended cyan-white reactor.
bosses.rupture-beast: Mechanical furnace beast with crusher limbs, cracked armor, and volcanic core.
bosses.ascendant: Apex machine with four weapon wings, crimson halos, and diamond core.
bosses.final-core: Four transforming concentric rings around a multi-spectrum prismatic reactor.
